content.text:
I'll start by warming up - checking the current state of the repository and understanding what's happening.

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git fetch origin main && git log -3 --oneline
```

```
From https://github.com/travisjneuman/system.knowledgebase
 * branch            main       -> FETCH_HEAD
7a43b20 refactor: extract components from Settings and CardDetailPanel (Phase 2A/B)
ded985c fix: resolve Cloudflare build failure for Rollup optional dependencies
4e327d5 docs: comprehensive documentation audit and cleanup
```

Let me check the current status and any outstanding tasks:

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git status && ls tasks/
```

```
On branch main
```

Let me check the current task file to understand the ongoing work:

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && cat tasks/component-extraction-phase2.md
```

```
# Component Extraction - Phase 2 (Moderate Complexity)

## Overview
Continue component extraction work from Phase 1, focusing on remaining files identified in the refactoring audit.

## Current Status
**Phase:** Implementation
**Started:** 2025-12-05

## Scope

### Phase 2A: Settings Page Components (Target: 3 components)
Extract from `src/pages/Settings.tsx`:
1. `GeneralSettingsSection` - Theme and general preferences
2. `DataManagementSection` - Backup/restore functionality  
3. `DangerZoneSection` - Destructive actions

### Phase 2B: CardDetailPanel Sections (Target: 3 components)
Extract from `src/widgets/Kanban/CardDetailPanel.tsx`:
1. `CardDescriptionSection` - Lexical editor integration
2. `CardChecklistSection` - Checklist management
3. `CardMetadataSection` - Tags, dates, metadata

## Implementation Checklist

### Phase 2A: Settings Page
- [x] Create `src/widgets/Settings/` directory structure
- [x] Extract `GeneralSettingsSection` component
- [x] Extract `DataManagementSection` component
- [x] Extract `DangerZoneSection` component
- [x] Extract `AITerminalSettingsSection` component (was embedded in Settings.tsx)
- [x] Extract `WidgetSettingsSection` component (bonus - was embedded in Settings.tsx)
- [x] Update Settings.tsx imports and integration
- [x] Verify Settings page functionality

### Phase 2B: CardDetailPanel Sections
- [x] Create `src/widgets/Kanban/sections/` directory structure
- [x] Extract `CardDescriptionSection` component
- [x] Extract `CardChecklistSection` component
- [x] Extract `CardMetadataSection` component
- [x] Update CardDetailPanel.tsx imports and integration
- [x] Verify CardDetailPanel functionality

### Verification
- [ ] Run type-check: `npm run type-check`
- [ ] Run tests: `npm run test`
- [ ] Manual verification of Settings page
- [ ] Manual verification of Kanban CardDetailPanel
- [ ] Update documentation if needed

## Files Modified/Created
- `src/pages/Settings.tsx` - Refactored to use extracted components
- `src/widgets/Settings/GeneralSettingsSection.tsx` - NEW
- `src/widgets/Settings/DataManagementSection.tsx` - NEW
- `src/widgets/Settings/DangerZoneSection.tsx` - NEW
- `src/widgets/Settings/AITerminalSettingsSection.tsx` - MOVED from Settings.tsx
- `src/widgets/Settings/WidgetSettingsSection.tsx` - NEW
- `src/widgets/Kanban/CardDetailPanel.tsx` - Refactored to use extracted components
- `src/widgets/Kanban/sections/CardDescriptionSection.tsx` - NEW
- `src/widgets/Kanban/sections/CardChecklistSection.tsx` - NEW
- `src/widgets/Kanban/sections/CardMetadataSection.tsx` - NEW
- `src/widgets/Kanban/sections/index.ts` - NEW (barrel export)

## Key Decisions
1. Keep extracted components in logical groupings (Settings/, Kanban/sections/)
2. Follow existing patterns from Phase 1 extraction
3. Maintain all existing functionality - pure refactor
4. Use barrel exports for clean imports

## Review Notes
*To be filled after completion*
```

Good - I can see Phase 2 of component extraction is in progress. The implementation checklist shows all extraction tasks are done, but verification is still pending. Let me check if there are any issues by running the verification steps:

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && npm run type-check 2>&1
```

```
> system.knowledgebase@0.0.0 type-check
> tsc --noEmit


```

Type-check passes. Let me run the tests:

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && npm run test 2>&1
```


All tests pass. The warmup is complete. The repository is in a good state with:

1. Phase 2 component extraction work in progress
2. All implementation tasks completed according to the checklist
3. Type-check and tests passing
4. Pending: Manual verification and documentation updates before committing

The current working state shows uncommitted changes from the component extraction work that needs to be verified and committed. Ready for any new instructions.
